Building 0→1 AI Products

I'm an AI Product Manager focused on building early-stage AI products.

I focus on shipping reliable, evaluation-first AI applications—including RAG systems, agents, and decision-support tools—where observability and unit economics are first-class constraints.

  • Built evaluation-driven LLM systems for real-world workflows
  • Designed GPT-4o Vision pipelines for document and receipt extraction
  • Building AI products, prototypes, and experiments in public

Flagship Product

SugarShield

Health-conscious shoppers struggle to judge sugar quality from ingredient lists quickly. Improved recall from 0.31 to 0.77 while maintaining 1.00 precision on 15 food products.

AI Products & Systems

Real AI products, prototypes, and experiments solving real-world problems.

SHIPPED PRODUCT
PROTOTYPE
SYSTEM DESIGN
Shipped Product Live

ReceiptIQ

Problem

Extracting data from messy, crumpled receipts is manual and error-prone.

Solution

A vision-to-LLM pipeline that transforms receipt images into structured transaction data.

Outcome

Validated 18 structured transactions and 172 item-level records from 20 receipts.

172 item-level records extracted
View Case Study Live GitHub
Shipped Product Live

PennyPal

Problem

Traditional financial apps lack conversational and intuitive interactions.

Solution

A voice-first GenAI companion that answers financial queries naturally.

Outcome

A voice-first companion that lets users ask financial questions and receive plain-language responses.

View Case Study GitHub
Shipped Product Live

Memora

Problem

Users take thousands of screenshots that become unsearchable clutter.

Solution

An automated extraction tool that indexes screenshots with semantic search.

Outcome

Transforms an unstructured screenshot archive into a semantic knowledge base you can query.

View Case Study Live GitHub
Shipped Product Live

Warmlist

Problem

Tracking high-intent network leads usually falls back to messy spreadsheets.

Solution

A smart CRM that uses AI to score and remind you about warm interactions.

Outcome

Replaces manual lead tracking with an AI-prioritized relationship queue.

View Case Study Live GitHub
System Design Live

SugarShield

Problem

Health-conscious shoppers struggle to judge sugar quality from ingredient lists quickly.

Solution

Rule-based ingredient classifier that detects hidden sugars and artificial sweeteners.

Outcome

Improved recall from 0.31 to 0.77 while maintaining 1.00 precision on 15 food products.

0.77 Recall · 1.00 Precision · 0 False Positives
View Case Study Live GitHub

AI Labs

Experiments exploring emerging AI capabilities and product ideas.

All Labs →
AIPrototypeExperiment

SleepSense

Description

AI-powered system transforming messy sleep notes into structured insights and patterns.

Takeaway

Experiment exploring how LLMs can convert unstructured personal health notes into structured behavioral insights.

View Experiment
Experiment Hub

Rellos Experiment Hub

Description

A collection of AI experiments, product explorations, and learnings from tools and workflows I test. This hub acts as a personal lab notebook where I document experiments, notes, and insights from AI products I explore.

Takeaway

A living record of how I explore, evaluate, and learn from emerging AI tools and product patterns.

Explore Experiments
AgentsAutomationEval

Agentic Email Sorter

Description

An autonomous agent that triages incoming emails based on custom priority rules.

Takeaway

Demonstrates how I design agentic workflows with evaluation hooks and safety guardrails.

View Experiment
RAGDataLLMs

RAG Financial Analyst

Description

Retrieval-Augmented Generation over 10-K filings to auto-answer investor queries.

Takeaway

Showcases my approach to building cost-effective RAG systems tailored for complex documents.

View Experiment

Concepts & Early-Stage Experiments

Idea-stage projects where I explored problems, hypotheses, and product directions before committing to full builds.

Concept Exploration Internal Tool

Contextual Inbox

Problem: Support teams waste time switching tabs to find user history and billing data.

Exploration: Explored an LLM-powered sidebar that surfaces relevant user context automatically. Paused after validating technical feasibility because of API cost constraints.

Coming soon
Idea-stage Unshipped Pricing

Pricing Optimizer

Problem: B2B SaaS companies struggle to test pricing elasticity dynamically.

Exploration: Designed a multi-armed bandit system to test pricing tiers. Explored but deprioritized due to data sparsity in early-stage products.

Coming soon

Professional Experience

I build products that bridge the gap between complex AI and real-world value.

AI Product Manager

2024 — Present

Stealth AI

  • • Led product development for AI-powered systems and internal tooling
  • • Designed evaluation-driven workflows for LLM features
  • • Defined product metrics around reliability, latency, and cost efficiency
  • • Collaborated with engineering teams to ship AI capabilities into production

Product Manager

2018 — 2023

Digital Connect

  • • Managed product roadmap for fintech platform services
  • • Led cross-functional collaboration across engineering, design, and operations
  • • Implemented data-driven prioritization and experimentation
  • • Delivered improvements in usability and product adoption

Co-Founder & Head of Product

2016 — 2018

Photon Edu Fintech

  • • Co-founded and built an education-focused fintech platform
  • • Led product design, roadmap, and go-to-market strategy
  • • Built MVP and scaled early product adoption

About Me

I'm an AI Product Manager focused on building early-stage AI products.

My work centers on designing evaluation-driven AI applications — including RAG systems, agents, and decision-support tools — with a strong focus on reliability and practical product design.

From Chaos to Clarity

Beyond Work

Outside of building AI products, I enjoy reading about startups, product strategy, behavioral design, and decision-making. These books have influenced how I think about building products and understanding users.

Zero to One

Peter Thiel

The Mom Test

Rob Fitzpatrick

Hooked

Nir Eyal

The Psychology of Money

Morgan Housel

Steve Jobs

Walter Isaacson

Strategy & Execution

Distilling product mental models from real-world systems.

All Writing →

Tap & Pray Is Not a Payment Strategy

Why frictionless payments require strong unit economics and retention loops.

A deep dive into why frictionless payments require more than just a 'tap'—they require a robust unit-economic strategy.

Core Mental Model: Payments as a strategic lever for customer retention and margin optimization, not just plumbing.
Success Metric: LTV/CAC improvements through payment-driven retention loops.

From Venue to Platform: The Bernabéu as a Product

Why infrastructure should be treated as a multi-tenant revenue platform.

Analyzing infrastructure as a product platform that enables multi-tenant revenue streams.

Core Mental Model: Asset-as-a-Platform: Enabling developers and partners to build 'on top' of physical space.
Success Metric: Non-matchday revenue growth and partner ecosystem health.
All Writing →

I'm always open to discussing RAG architecture, agentic workflows, or AI product strategy.
